diagrams.title: Virtual Function Inheritance Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows how virtual attribute flows through inheritance chain from base to derived classes
elements: More derived class with optional override
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how virtual nature propagates through class hierarchy without explicit redeclaration

diagrams.title: V-Table and V-Ptr Mechanism
diagrams.description: Complete diagram showing how virtual function calls are resolved at runtime
elements: Code memory showing actual function implementations
diagrams.purpose: Understand the runtime polymorphism mechanism through vtable/vptr

diagrams.title: Slicing Problem Illustration
diagrams.description: Shows what happens when derived object assigned to base by value
elements: Large Derived object (Base portion + Derived portion)
Assignment to Base object by value
Visual comparison: Full polymorphic object vs Sliced object
diagrams.purpose: Understand why slicing destroys polymorphism and how to prevent it

diagrams.title: Constructor Destructor Order
diagrams.description: Timeline diagram showing call order in inheritance hierarchy
diagrams.purpose: Remember correct order of construction and destruction in inheritance
